source_name: Learn about Gemini, the everyday AI assistant from Google
text:
Title: Learn about Gemini, the everyday AI assistant from Google
URL: https://vertexaisearch.cloud.google.com/grounding-api-redirect/AUZIYQGaZFMP17qR7WQt8fclJ4Hnaf8tqEbbgrV_bZPxIYVTQzDRNRjJX9hyb_ewDxjf87oaBI5S--eAUEAQv0r-51FPRZ40Frni3QwJlgo54MQQNc92vuelEg==
Gemini is Google's everyday AI assistant, designed to help with tasks across multiple apps like Gmail, Google Calendar, and YouTube. It offers features for creativity and productivity, including creating custom soundtracks, generating videos, answering complex questions, and image creation. Users can also engage in real-time conversations with Gemini Live.
